title: Slovakian Pepper Stir-Fry
description: A spicy and flavorful stir-fry inspired by traditional Slovakian cuisine. This dish is quick to make and packed with nutrients.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of stir oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add sliced Slovakian pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add remaining 1 tablespoon of stir oil, pepper, and spicy (if using) to the skillet.
Stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes until the vegetables are coated in the spice mixture.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
